children.heading: Construction
children.label: a Construction
children.text: No grant which the Administrator is authorized to make to any applicant for construction of sewage treatment works in any area in any State may be withheld, conditioned, or restricted by the Administrator on the basis of any requirement of this chapter except as provided in subsection (b).

children.heading: Withholding, conditioning, or restriction of construction grants
children.label: b Withholding, conditioning, or restriction of construction grants

children.text: such treatment works will not comply with applicable standards under section 7411 or 7412 of this title,

the State does not have in effect, or is not carrying out, a State implementation plan approved by the Administrator which expressly quantifies and provides for the increase in emissions of each air pollutant (from stationary and mobile sources in any area to which either part C or part D of subchapter I applies for such pollutant) which increase may reasonably be anticipated to result directly or indirectly from the new sewage treatment capacity which would be created by such construction.1So in original. The period probably should be a comma.1

children.label: A
children.text: may reasonably be anticipated to cause or contribute to, directly or indirectly, an increase in emissions of any air pollutant in excess of the increase provided for under the provisions referred to in paragraph (2) for any such area, or

children.label: B
children.text: would otherwise not be in conformity with the applicable implementation plan, or
such increase in emissions would interfere with, or be inconsistent with, the applicable implementation plan for any other State.

children.heading: National Environmental Policy Act
children.label: c National Environmental Policy Act
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to amend or alter any provision of the National Environmental Policy Act [ et seq.] or to affect any determination as to whether or not the requirements of such Act have been met in the case of the construction of any sewage treatment works.42 U.S.C. 4321
